final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [2:0] q
);

    // Always block triggered on the rising edge of the clock
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 3'd0;  // Synchronous reset to 0
        end else begin
            q <= q + 3'd1;  // Increment the counter
        end
    end

endmodule
